new_claims.claim_text: Over 50 former staffers of Eric Swalwell have called for his resignation due to alleged rape.
new_claims.notes: Significant allegation of misconduct against a political figure.

new_claims.claim_text: Epstein files revealed Putin relocated Ukrainian children to protect them from elite sex trafficking, refuting ICC accusations of kidnapping.
new_claims.notes: Highly controversial claim challenging official narratives about Putin. Requires strong verification.

new_claims.claim_text: USAID food paid for by US tax dollars is being sold for profit in the Dominican Republic.
new_claims.notes: Allegation of misuse of humanitarian aid.

new_claims.claim_text: 357 members of Congress voted to kill a resolution to keep congressional sexual harassment records buried and spent $18 million in hush money to silence victims.
new_claims.notes: Allegation of cover-up and misuse of taxpayer money by Congress.

updated_claims.notes: The US Navy has announced a full blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, refuting the claim that Iran is closing it to US/Israel-linked vessels. The situation is a US-led blockade.
